title: Creamy Garlic Pasta
description: A simple creamy pasta dish with garlic, parmesan, and butter.
steps: Boil pasta in salted water until al dente.
Sauté minced garlic in butter until fragrant.
Stir in cream and parmesan to make the sauce.
Toss pasta with sauce, season, and serve.

title: Chicken Veggie Stir-Fry
description: Quick weeknight stir-fry with tender chicken and crisp vegetables in a savory sauce.
steps: Slice chicken and vegetables into even pieces.
Stir-fry chicken until cooked through, then set aside.
Cook vegetables over high heat until crisp-tender.
Return chicken, add sauce, and serve over rice.

title: Classic Caesar Salad
description: Crisp romaine with homemade-style dressing, croutons, and parmesan.
steps: Wash and chop romaine into bite-sized pieces.
Whisk dressing ingredients until creamy.
Toss lettuce with dressing and croutons.
Top with shaved parmesan and serve chilled.

title: Beef Street Tacos
description: Seasoned ground beef tacos with onion, cilantro, and lime on warm corn tortillas.
steps: Brown ground beef with spices until fully cooked.
Warm tortillas in a dry pan.
Fill tortillas with beef and diced onion.
Garnish with cilantro and a squeeze of lime.

title: Tomato Basil Soup
description: Comforting blended tomato soup finished with fresh basil and cream.
steps: Sauté onion and garlic until soft.
Simmer tomatoes and broth for 20 minutes.
Blend until smooth and stir in cream.
Finish with fresh basil before serving.

title: Fluffy Scrambled Eggs
description: Soft, buttery scrambled eggs perfect for breakfast or a light meal.
steps: Whisk eggs with milk, salt, and pepper.
Melt butter in a pan over low-medium heat.
Cook eggs slowly, stirring until just set.
Garnish with chives and serve immediately.

title: One-Pan Lemon Herb Rice
description: Fragrant rice cooked with lemon, parsley, and garlic in a single pan.
steps: Toast rice briefly with garlic in olive oil.
Add broth and lemon zest, then cover and simmer.
Fluff rice and fold in parsley and lemon juice.
Rest for 5 minutes before serving.

title: Pan-Seared Salmon
description: Crispy-skinned salmon fillet with a simple lemon butter finish.
steps: Pat salmon dry and season both sides.
Sear skin-side down until crisp and golden.
Flip and cook to desired doneness.
Spoon lemon butter over salmon and serve.

title: Coconut Chickpea Curry
description: Plant-based curry with chickpeas, spinach, and warming spices in coconut milk.
steps: Sauté onion, garlic, and curry powder until aromatic.
Add chickpeas and coconut milk, then simmer.
Stir in spinach until wilted.
Serve over steamed rice.

title: Classic Cheeseburger
description: Juicy beef patty with melted cheddar on a toasted bun and classic toppings.
steps: Form and season beef patties.
Cook patties to desired doneness and melt cheese on top.
Toast buns lightly.
Assemble burger with toppings and serve.

title: Margherita Flatbread Pizza
description: Quick flatbread pizza with tomato, mozzarella, and fresh basil.
steps: Spread tomato sauce evenly over flatbread.
Top with mozzarella and a drizzle of olive oil.
Bake until cheese is bubbly and edges are crisp.
Add fresh basil before slicing.

title: Sesame Garlic Noodles
description: Savory Asian-inspired noodles tossed in a sesame soy garlic sauce.
steps: Cook noodles according to package directions.
Whisk soy sauce, sesame oil, and minced garlic.
Toss hot noodles with sauce until coated.
Garnish with green onion and sesame seeds.

title: Honey Mustard Baked Chicken
description: Oven-baked chicken thighs glazed with sweet and tangy honey mustard.
steps: Mix honey, mustard, garlic, and spices into a glaze.
Coat chicken thighs and arrange on a baking sheet.
Bake until internal temperature is safe and skin is golden.
Rest briefly and serve with pan juices.

title: Mediterranean Quinoa Bowl
description: Protein-packed bowl with quinoa, cucumber, tomato, feta, and lemon dressing.
steps: Cook quinoa and let it cool slightly.
Dice vegetables and crumble feta.
Whisk lemon olive oil dressing.
Combine all ingredients and toss to serve.

title: Blueberry Buttermilk Pancakes
description: Fluffy pancakes studded with blueberries and served with maple syrup.
steps: Mix dry and wet ingredients until just combined.
Fold in blueberries gently.
Cook pancakes on a buttered griddle until golden.
Serve warm with maple syrup.

title: Garlic Butter Ribeye
description: Restaurant-style ribeye finished with garlic herb butter and a proper rest.
steps: Bring steak to room temperature and season generously.
Sear in a hot pan to develop a deep crust.
Baste with garlic herb butter while finishing.
Rest, slice, and serve with pan butter.

title: Quick Miso Ramen Bowl
description: Fast homemade-style ramen with miso broth, noodles, egg, and greens.
steps: Simmer broth with miso and soy sauce.
Cook noodles separately and drain.
Blanch bok choy in the broth.
Assemble bowls with noodles, broth, egg, and green onion.

title: Weeknight Spinach Lasagna
description: Layered lasagna with ricotta, spinach, marinara, and melted mozzarella.
steps: Mix ricotta with spinach, garlic, and seasoning.
Layer noodles, sauce, ricotta mixture, and cheese.
Repeat layers until the dish is full.
Bake covered, then uncover to brown the top.

title: Garlic Lemon Shrimp Skewers
description: Grilled shrimp skewers marinated in garlic, lemon, and herbs.
steps: Marinate shrimp in lemon, garlic, and herbs.
Thread shrimp onto skewers evenly.
Grill 2-3 minutes per side until opaque.
Serve with extra lemon and herbs.

title: Fudgy Chocolate Brownies
description: Rich, dense brownies with a crackly top and deep chocolate flavor.
steps: Melt butter and chocolate together.
Whisk in eggs, sugar, and vanilla.
Fold in flour and cocoa until just combined.
Bake until set at the edges but fudgy in the center.
